botMessages.message: Hey, Sales Copilot here. I can pull up a project summary, update a date, or log a note. What do you need?
Sorry, it looks like something has gone wrong.

botDialogs.label: Unfortunately, a system error occurred. Let us start again.

botMessages.message: One moment while I connect you to the next available service representative.

BotVersion.company:
GyanSys is a leading global system integrator supporting enterprise customers. GyanSys is a global mid-tier professional services firm with expertise across the following:
Platforms: SAP, Salesforce, Microsoft, and ServiceNow

conversationVariables.description: Stores the authentication key that's used to generate the verification code.
conversationVariables.label: authenticationKey

conversationVariables.description: Stores the Salesforce user ID or contact ID.
conversationVariables.label: customerId

conversationVariables.description: Stores the customer ID type, whether it's a Salesforce user or a contact.
conversationVariables.label: customerType

conversationVariables.description: Stores the Salesforce Case ID created by an inbound email.
conversationVariables.label: emailCaseId

conversationVariables.description: Stores the Salesforce Contact ID associated with the end user who sent the inbound email.
conversationVariables.label: endUserContactId

conversationVariables.description: Stores email address of the end user who sent the inbound email.
conversationVariables.label: endUserEmail

conversationVariables.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the customer code is verified.
conversationVariables.label: isVerified

conversationVariables.description: This variable may also be referred to as VerifiedCustomerId
conversationVariables.label: VerifiedCustomerId

BotVersion.role: Acts as a hands-free voice CRM copilot for sales reps. Retrieves project status, account details, key dates, and open risks on demand. Executes project updates — date changes and note logging — through natural conversation, with explicit verbal confirmation required before any write operation. Only acts on projects owned by or assigned to the calling rep. Keeps all responses concise and spoken-word friendly — no IDs, no raw field names, no lists longer than three items.
